name: AiPrise
description: AI-powered KYB, KYC, and business verification API with 200+ country coverage.

seo.title: AiPrise — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: AiPrise: AI-powered KYB, KYC, and business verification API with 200+ country coverage.

when_to_use: KYC identity verification for fintech account opening
KYB business onboarding with UBO discovery in 200+ countries
Document verification for crypto exchange onboarding (VASP)
Sanctions and PEP screening during customer due diligence
Re-verification trigger on high-risk transaction events

pros: 200+ country coverage for KYB and KYC in one API
AI-driven document and business verification pipeline
Single integration replaces multiple regional vendors
Supports global fintechs with unified risk scoring
cons: Less established brand than Trulioo or Onfido
Limited public pricing forces sales calls
Coverage depth varies widely across the 200 markets
Newer AI models may need tuning for edge locales
review.verdict: Global-reach KYB/KYC API worth testing when you need one vendor instead of regional stitching.
review.best_for: Cross-border fintechs and marketplaces onboarding businesses in many emerging markets
review.not_for: Teams needing a battle-tested enterprise vendor with published audit trails and SLAs

lock_in.reason: KYC/KYB results portable via reports but workflows proprietary

developer_experience.reason: REST APIs with docs, regional verification focus
